The Collective

We do not just shoot footage. We sculpt light.We believe that brand identity is a narrative arc, not a logo placement.

Lumen is a multidisciplinary studio operating at the intersection of cinema and commerce.

Disciplines

Pre-Prod

  • Creative Direction
  • Script Development
  • Storyboarding
  • Casting & Locations

Production

  • Principal Photography
  • Cinematography
  • Drone Operations
  • Set Design

Post

  • Editorial
  • Color Grading
  • Sound Design
  • VFX & Compositing
